title: A new $H_0$ measurement with SNe Requiem and Encore using Gravity.jl
summary: We present a strong-lensing (SL) analysis of the galaxy cluster MACS J0138.0-2155 (z=0.336), the first known lens cluster discovered to host two distinct multiply imaged Type Ia supernovae (SNe): SN Requiem and SN Encore. Both transients are located in the massive, multiply imaged red galaxy MRG-M0138 at z=1.949. The projected total mass of this cluster has been investigated with several independent lens models (Suyu+26; Pierel+26), using a sample of 23 spectroscopically confirmed multiple images from 8 background sources (0.767<z<3.420), identified from the HST and the JWST imaging data, and VLT/MUSE spectroscopy. In this work, we develop a new SL model based on a novel Bayesian parametric lens-modelling framework Gravity.jl, exploiting the same SL dataset. Our reference mass model accurately reproduces the observed image positions, with an image-plane rms image position residual of 0.24''. Assuming H0 = 70 km/s/Mpc, we predict the future reappearances of highly delayed SNe counter-images, finding Dt(1d,1a) = 3177_{-59}^{+78} d (May-September, 2032) for SN Encore and Dt(2d,2a) = 3938_{-77}^{+90} d (February-July, 2027) for SN Requiem. By allowing H0 to vary, and using the measured time delays of both SN Encore and SN Requiem together with their statistical uncertainties as observables, we infer the value of H0 jointly with the other lens-model free parameters. From this analysis, we obtain a new measurement of H0 = 67.0_{-7.8}^{+9.3} km/s/Mpc, consistent with the value inferred from the aforementioned independent lens models. This error is currently dominated by the large relative uncertainty on the measured time delays (>10%). The forthcoming reappearance of SN Requiem offers an immediate opportunity to significantly improve constraints on H0, provided that lens-model systematics are controlled. These results establish M0138 as a premier anchor for high-precision cluster-scale TDC.

AI.tldr: 本文利用新开发的贝叶斯参数透镜建模框架Gravity.jl，对星系团MACS J0138.0-2155进行强透镜分析，基于该团簇中两个多像Ia型超新星（SN Requiem和SN Encore）的观测数据，预测了它们未来的重现时间，并联合时间延迟测量约束哈勃常数H0=67.0_{-7.8}^{+9.3} km/s/Mpc。
AI.motivation: 星系团MACS J0138.0-2155是首个被发现宿主两个不同多像Ia型超新星（SN Requiem和SN Encore）的透镜团簇，这为利用时间延迟宇宙学（TDC）精确测量哈勃常数提供了独特机遇。此前已有若干独立透镜模型，但本研究旨在通过新的建模框架进一步提高精度并预测未来超新星重现事件。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们呈现了对星系团MACS J0138.0-2155（z=0.336）的强透镜（SL）分析，这是已知首个被发现有两次不同多重成像Ia型超新星（SNe）的透镜星系团：SN Requiem和SN Encore。这两个瞬变现象均位于z=1.949的大质量多重成像红色星系MRG-M0138中。该星系团的投影总质量已通过几个独立的透镜模型（Suyu+26; Pierel+26）进行了研究，这些模型使用了来自8个背景源（0.767<z<3.420）的23个光谱确认的多重图像样本，这些图像来自HST和JWST成像数据以及VLT/MUSE光谱。在这项工作中，我们基于一种新颖的贝叶斯参数透镜建模框架Gravity.jl开发了一个新的SL模型，利用了相同的SL数据集。我们的参考质量模型精确地再现了观测到的图像位置，图像平面均方根位置残差为0.24角秒。假设H0 = 70 km/s/Mpc，我们预测了高度延迟的SNe对应像的未来重现，发现SN Encore的Dt(1d,1a) = 3177_{-59}^{+78} 天（2032年5月至9月），SN Requiem的Dt(2d,2a) = 3938_{-77}^{+90} 天（2027年2月至7月）。通过允许H0变化，并利用SN Encore和SN Requiem的测量时间延迟及其统计不确定性作为观测量，我们联合推断出H0的值以及其他透镜模型自由参数。从这一分析中，我们得到了H0 = 67.0_{-7.8}^{+9.3} km/s/Mpc的新测量值，与前述独立透镜模型推断的值一致。该误差目前主要由测量时间延迟的大相对不确定性（>10%）主导。SN Requiem即将到来的重现为显著改进H0约束提供了直接机遇，前提是控制透镜模型系统误差。这些结果确立了M0138作为高精度星系团尺度时间延迟宇宙学的首要锚点。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，M0138被确立为高精度星系团尺度时间延迟宇宙学的优先锚点。SN Requiem即将于2027年重现，为显著改进H0约束提供了直接机遇，前提是控制透镜模型系统误差。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1 : M0138 observed with the JWST. The colour composite is constructed from the following filter combinations: F115W \(+\) F150W in blue, F200W \(+\) F277W in green, and F356W \(+\) F444W in red. The locations of the “gold” multiple-image systems are marked with circles (Ertl et al., 2025 ; Suyu et al., 2026 ) . SN Encore corresponds to System 1, while SN Requiem corresponds to System 2. The foreground (FG) and background (BG) galaxies are indicated by green circles. The three jellyfish galaxies are marked with cyan circles and labelled JF1, JF2, and JF3.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：使用JWST观测的M0138。彩色合成图像由以下滤光片组合构建：F115W \(+\) F150W（蓝色）、F200W \(+\) F277W（绿色）和F356W \(+\) F444W（红色）。“金色”多重图像系统的位置用圆圈标记（Ertl等人，2025；Suyu等人，2026）。SN Encore对应系统1，SN Requiem对应系统2。前景（FG）和背景（BG）星系用绿色圆圈表示。三个水母星系用青色圆圈标记，并标注为JF1、JF2和JF3。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2 : Calibration of the Faber–Jackson relation for cluster members from Acebron et al. ( 2025 ) . The circles show the measured stellar velocity dispersions of 14 bright cluster galaxies as a function of their total HST F160W magnitude. Points are colour-coded by the average spectral signal-to-noise ratio reported by Granata et al. ( 2025 ) . The reference galaxy used in the scaling relation is the BCG ( \(\sigma_{{BCG}}=322^{+16}_{-16}\,{km}\,{s}^{-1}\) , \(m_{{F160W}}=15.30\) ). The orange line and shaded region show the median \(\sigma_{0}\) – \({F160W}\) relation and its \(68\%\) confidence interval derived from the stellar kinematic measurements, following the procedure described in Sect. 3.4.2 . The blue line and shaded region show the corresponding relation predicted by the SL model.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：来自Acebron等人（2025）的星系团成员Faber–Jackson关系校准。圆圈显示了14个明亮星系团星系的测量恒星速度弥散度，作为其总HST F160W星等的函数。点根据Granata等人（2025）报告的平均光谱信噪比进行颜色编码。标度关系中使用的参考星系是BCG（\(\sigma_{{BCG}}=322^{+16}_{-16}\,{km}\,{s}^{-1}\)，\(m_{{F160W}}=15.30\)）。橙色线和阴影区域显示了根据第3.4.2节所述程序，从恒星运动学测量推导出的中位数\(\sigma_{0}\) – \({F160W}\)关系及其\(68\%\)置信区间。蓝色线和阴影区域显示了SL模型预测的相应关系。

figures.caption_en: Table 1: Summary of the best-fit SL models for M0138. 4 4 4 Summary of the SL models and their overall performance. The columns report the model name, the number of free parameters explicitly varied in the lens model, \(N_{par}\) , the number of observational constraints, \(N_{const}\) , the number of degrees of freedom, d.o.f., the minimum total chi-square value, \(\chi^{2}_{{min,\,tot}}=\chi_{{min,\,pos}}^{2}+\chi_{{min,\,td}}^{2}\) , the positional contribution to the total chi-square, \(\chi_{{min,\,pos}}^{2}\) , the time-delay contribution to the total chi-square, \(\chi_{{min,\,td}}^{2}=\chi_{{min,\,td\,(E)}}^{2}+\chi_{{min,\,td\,(R)}}^{2}\) (where the two terms denote the contributions from SN Encore and SN Requiem, respectively), the minimum chi-square value per degree-of-freedom \(\tilde{\chi}^{2}_{{min}}\) , the \(\Delta_{{rms}}\) value, and the mean Gelman–Rubin convergence statistic, \(\langle\hat{R}\rangle\) , of the MCMC chains. The number of degrees of freedom is computed as \({d.o.f.}=N_{const}-N_{par}-2N_{src}\) , where \(N_{src}=8\) is the number of independent source families, each contributing two source-plane coordinates that are marginalised over as nuisance parameters.
figures.caption_zh: 表1：M0138的最佳拟合SL模型总结。4 4 4 SL模型及其整体性能总结。列报告了模型名称、透镜模型中显式变化的自由参数数量\(N_{par}\)、观测约束数量\(N_{const}\)、自由度数量d.o.f.、最小总卡方值\(\chi^{2}_{{min,\,tot}}=\chi_{{min,\,pos}}^{2}+\chi_{{min,\,td}}^{2}\)、总卡方中的位置贡献\(\chi_{{min,\,pos}}^{2}\)、总卡方中的时间延迟贡献\(\chi_{{min,\,td}}^{2}=\chi_{{min,\,td\,(E)}}^{2}+\chi_{{min,\,td\,(R)}}^{2}\)（其中两项分别表示来自SN Encore和SN Requiem的贡献）、每自由度最小卡方值\(\tilde{\chi}^{2}_{{min}}\)、\(\Delta_{{rms}}\)值以及MCMC链的平均Gelman–Rubin收敛统计量\(\langle\hat{R}\rangle\)。自由度计算为\({d.o.f.}=N_{const}-N_{par}-2N_{src}\)，其中\(N_{src}=8\)是独立源族的数量，每个源族贡献两个作为 nuisance 参数被边缘化的源平面坐标。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3 : Positional offsets between the observed and model-predicted multiple images in MACS J0138. The circles mark the observed image positions, while the arrows indicate the direction and magnitude of the offsets toward the corresponding model-predicted positions. For visual clarity, the arrow lengths have been magnified by a factor of ten relative to the true positional offsets. The \((0,0)\) point corresponds to the position of the BCG. The background contours show the total projected mass distribution obtained from the best-fitting lens model.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：MACS J0138中观测到的和模型预测的多重图像之间的位置偏移。圆圈标记观测到的图像位置，箭头指示朝向相应模型预测位置的偏移方向和大小。为视觉清晰起见，箭头长度相对于真实位置偏移放大了十倍。\((0,0)\)点对应BCG的位置。背景等高线显示了从最佳拟合透镜模型获得的总投影质量分布。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4 : Comparison between the observed and model-predicted SB distribution of the multiply imaged host galaxy MRG-M0138. The left panel shows the observed BCG-subtracted JWST F200W image, while the right panel shows the image-plane prediction obtained by lensing the best-fitting Sérsic model of the background source through the reference H0_fixed mass model. The Sérsic source-light parameters were optimised using the pixels associated with the arc hosting multiple image 3c, while the remaining counter-images were predicted a posteriori and were not included in the light-profile optimisation. The two insets on the right show the normalised residuals, clipped to the range \([-20\,\sigma,+20\,\sigma]\) , for the two regions highlighted by the dashed blue boxes in the model-prediction panel. Residuals associated with host-galaxy images 3d and 3e are omitted because of the contamination from the BCG. Red circles mark the observed multiple images of MRG-M0138 (left panel), listed in Table 4 in Ertl et al. ( 2025 ) , while the red boxes in the right panel correspond to the predicted positions. The blue cross in the right panel shows the predicted position of the host galaxy in the source plane. Coordinates are given in arcseconds relative to the BCG ( \({RA}=24.51570318\) deg, \({Dec}=-21.92547911\) deg).
figures.caption_zh: 图4：观测到的和模型预测的多重成像宿主星系MRG-M0138的面亮度分布比较。左图显示了观测到的BCG减除后的JWST F200W图像，而右图显示了通过将背景源的最佳拟合Sérsic模型通过参考H0_fixed质量模型进行透镜成像得到的图像平面预测。Sérsic源光参数是使用与多重图像3c相关的弧的像素进行优化的，而其余对应像是事后预测的，并未包含在光分布优化中。右图上的两个插图显示了归一化残差，裁剪到范围\([-20\,\sigma,+20\,\sigma]\)，对应于模型预测面板中虚线蓝色框突出的两个区域。由于BCG的污染，省略了与宿主星系图像3d和3e相关的残差。红色圆圈标记了MRG-M0138的观测多重图像（左图），列于Ertl等人（2025）的表4中，而右图中的红色方框对应于预测位置。右图中的蓝色十字显示了宿主星系在源平面中的预测位置。坐标以相对于BCG的角秒给出（\({RA}=24.51570318\)度，\({Dec}=-21.92547911\)度）。

figures.caption_en: Table 2 : Predicted time delays and magnifications of multiple images of SN Encore and SN Requiem ( H0_fixed mass model). 5 5 5 Values are reported as the median from the \(1000\) sampled chains, with uncertainties corresponding to the \(16\) th and \(84\) th percentiles. Images marked with * are model-predicted images that have not been detected to date, either because of their faintness, as for image 1c, or because of their long predicted time delays, as for images 1d, 1e, 2d, and 2e. Image 1e of SN Encore and image 2e of SN Requiem, marked with † , are predicted in \(47\%\) and \(34\%\) of the posterior samples, respectively; all other images are predicted in all samples. The reference anchor epoch \(t=0\) is set to 2016-07-18 for image 2a of SN Requiem (Rodney et al., 2021 ) , and to 2023-11-17 for image 1a of SN Encore (Pierel et al., 2024 ) .
figures.caption_zh: 表2：SN Encore和SN Requiem多重图像的预测时间延迟和放大率（H0_fixed质量模型）。5 5 5 值报告为来自\(1000\)个采样链的中位数，不确定性对应于\(16\)和\(84\)百分位数。标有*的图像是迄今为止尚未检测到的模型预测图像，要么是因为它们的光度暗淡（如图像1c），要么是因为它们预测的时间延迟较长（如图像1d、1e、2d和2e）。SN Encore的图像1e和SN Requiem的图像2e（标有†）分别在后验样本的\(47\%\)和\(34\%\)中被预测；所有其他图像在所有样本中都被预测。参考锚点历元\(t=0\)对于SN Requiem的图像2a设置为2016-07-18（Rodney等人，2021），对于SN Encore的图像1a设置为2023-11-17（Pierel等人，2024）。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5 : Predicted reappearance time of image 2d of SN Requiem, expressed as the time delay relative to image 2a, \(\Delta t_{2d,2a}\) . The blue point shows the prediction from the Gravity.jl model presented in this work, while the other points show the predictions from the independent lens models analysed by Suyu et al. ( 2026 ) . Horizontal error bars indicate the corresponding \(68\%\) credible intervals. For our model, the interval is derived from \(1000\) posterior samples randomly drawn from the H0_fixed MCMC chains.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：SN Requiem图像2d的预测重现时间，表示为相对于图像2a的时间延迟\(\Delta t_{2d,2a}\)。蓝色点显示了本文提出的Gravity.jl模型的预测，而其他点显示了Suyu等人（2026）分析的独立透镜模型的预测。水平误差条表示相应的\(68\%\)置信区间。对于我们的模型，该区间是从H0_fixed MCMC链中随机抽取的\(1000\)个后验样本推导出的。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6 : Comparison of the predicted positions of the multiple images of SN Encore from the Gravity.jl model with those obtained from the independent lens models analysed by Suyu et al. ( 2026 ) . Each panel shows one image of SN Encore: the observed images 1a and 1b, and the model-predicted images 1c and 1d. Different symbols and colours correspond to different lens models, as indicated in the legend. The Gravity.jl predictions are shown in blue. The shaded bands show the projected uncertainty region associated with the Gravity.jl prediction. Grey circles denote the observed measured values (Pierel et al., 2024 ) .
figures.caption_zh: 图6：来自Gravity.jl模型的SN Encore多重图像预测位置与Suyu等人（2026）分析的独立透镜模型获得的预测位置的比较。每个面板显示SN Encore的一个图像：观测图像1a和1b，以及模型预测图像1c和1d。不同的符号和颜色对应不同的透镜模型，如图例所示。Gravity.jl预测以蓝色显示。阴影带显示了与Gravity.jl预测相关的投影不确定性区域。灰色圆圈表示观测到的测量值（Pierel等人，2024）。

title: GIGA-Lens 2.0: Strong-Lens Modeling on Multiple GPU Nodes
summary: We present GIGA-Lens 2.0: a major upgrade to the GPU-accelerated Bayesian framework for modeling strong lensing systems that allows it to be run across multiple GPU nodes. We have succeeded in running GIGA-Lens 2.0 on 128 nodes or 512 A100 GPUs. We demonstrate the speed benefits of this new version, and apply them to modeling 100 simulated systems and a real system, DESI J238.5690+04.7276. We also present other changes to the framework that have yielded further improvement on performance.

AI.tldr: GIGA-Lens 2.0 是GPU加速贝叶斯强透镜建模框架的重大升级，支持多GPU节点运行（最多128节点/512个A100 GPU），在100个模拟系统和真实系统DESI J238.5690+04.7276上展示了速度优势。
AI.motivation: 提升GIGA-Lens框架的计算性能，使其能够跨多个GPU节点运行，以处理更大规模的强透镜建模问题。
AI.method: 将GIGA-Lens框架升级为分布式版本，支持在128个节点（512个A100 GPU）上并行运行，并进行了其他性能优化改进。
AI.result: 成功在128节点/512个A100 GPU上运行，并在100个模拟系统和真实系统DESI J238.5690+04.7276上验证了速度提升效果。
AI.conclusion: GIGA-Lens 2.0通过多GPU分布式并行计算显著提升了强透镜建模效率，为更大规模的数据处理提供了可能。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Schematic of distributed computation for the SVI stage of the GIGA-Lens 2.0 pipeline, broken down into six steps, each represented by a box. We show \(N\) GPU nodes with a total of 4 \(N\) GPUs. A device is synonymous with a single GPU. Each step is represented by a box; the steps where computation takes place on individual devices are shown as blue and the yellow box is the step where communications among all devices, including across nodes, are required. The communication among the GPUs on one node is accomplished via JAX pmap , whereas the communication across multiple GPU nodes is accomplished via JAX shard_map . All the GPUs are shown in box 2. This box is replicated in steps 3 and 4, but for brevity, we do not show individual GPUs. The communication among devices and across nodes takes place in step 5, the yellow box. title: Probing Magnetic Fields In and Around Galaxies Near and Far
comment: Published in Advancing Astrophysics with the SKA II (AASKAII), 2026 (arXiv:2606.20366). Report-no:AASKAII/Mao01
summary: In order to understand the magnetization of galaxies and the role of magnetic fields in feedback processes that govern star formation and galaxy evolution, it is essential to have a comprehensive census of magnetic fields in and around galaxies from the nearby Universe to high redshifts. In this chapter, we outline the science goals, strategies, techniques, and observational requirements with SKA AA4 for (1) a homogeneous polarimetric survey of nearby galaxies - mapping both the diffuse polarized emission as well as producing a dense RM grid within the virial radius; (2) a survey of the interstellar magnetic fields in distant galaxies targeting strong lensing systems with polarized lensed quasars, as well as a general statistical back-illumination survey to probe the redshift evolution of magnetic fields in the CGM. These proposed observations will serve as a major step towards understanding the co-evolution of galaxies and their magnetic fields over cosmic time and provide constraints on galactic dynamo theories.

AI.tldr: 本文概述了利用SKA AA4进行星系磁场观测的科学目标与策略，包括对近邻星系的偏振巡天以及通过强引力透镜系统探测高红移星系磁场，以理解星系与磁场的共演化。
AI.motivation: 理解星系的磁化以及磁场在恒星形成和星系演化中的反馈作用，需要从近邻宇宙到高红移全面普查星系内外的磁场。

AI.conclusion: SKA AA4的上述观测方案是揭示磁场在星系形成与演化中作用的重要里程碑。

title: MSA-3D: Rotation Curves and Dark Matter Fractions at z~0.5-1.7 with JWST/NIRSpec
comment: 21 pages + 8 appendix + 15 supplementary material, 14 figures, submitted to A&A
summary: We present rotation curves and inner mass distributions for 30 star-forming galaxies at $0.5<z<1.7$, observed with JWST/NIRSpec as part of the MSA-3D Cycle 1 survey. Combining spatially resolved ionised-gas kinematics with JWST/NIRCam imaging, we constrain baryonic and dark matter contributions through forward dynamical modelling for galaxies extending down to stellar masses of $\sim10^{9}M_\odot$. For the 23 galaxies in our primary statistical sample, we find predominantly rotationally supported disks with intrinsic dispersions $σ_0\sim31$-65 km s$^{-1}$ and a wide range of dark matter fractions, $f_{DM}(R_e)\sim0.1$-0.9, with a median of 0.63 and substantial galaxy-to-galaxy scatter of $\sim0.2$ dex. These results are supported by a complementary consistency check using stellar mass maps and SFR-derived gas profiles. Among the 19 galaxies reaching $\gtrsim2R_e$, we identify six rising, six flat, and seven falling rotation curves. These classes define an observed ordering from rotationally dominated, dark-matter-rich disks ($V_{rot}/σ_0\approx4$, $f_{DM}\gtrsim0.7$) to more dispersion-supported systems with centrally concentrated baryonic mass distributions ($V_{rot}/σ_0\approx2$, $f_{DM}\lesssim0.55$). The stellar Tully-Fisher relation lies close to the local relation evolved under the adopted self-similar $Λ$CDM scaling. A simplified seeing-degradation test shifts the inferred normalisation by ~0.2 dex at fixed $V_c$, suggesting that spatial resolution contributes to, but does not fully explain, differences among high-redshift Tully-Fisher measurements. Overall, MSA-3D provides a high-resolution extension of previous surveys toward lower stellar masses, spanning $9.0 < \log(M_\star/M_\odot) < 11.2$, and reinforces that star-forming disks near $z\sim1$ span a broad range of dynamical states and inner mass distributions.

AI.tldr: 基于JWST/NIRSpec的MSA-3D巡天数据，对30个红移0.5-1.7的恒星形成星系进行旋转曲线和暗物质分布分析，发现23个星系中暗物质分数中位数为0.63，存在旋转曲线上升、平坦、下降三种形态，且恒星Tully-Fisher关系接近局域关系。
AI.motivation: 利用JWST高分辨率数据，研究高红移（z~1）恒星形成星系的动力学状态和暗物质分布，填补较低恒星质量星系的高红移观测空白，探讨空间分辨率对Tully-Fisher关系测量的影响。
AI.method: 结合JWST/NIRSpec空间分辨电离气体运动学和JWST/NIRCam成像数据，通过正向动力学建模约束重子和暗物质贡献；使用恒星质量图和SFR导出气体剖面进行一致性检验；进行简化的视宁度退化测试。
AI.result: 23个星系中，暗物质分数f_DM(Re)范围0.1-0.9，中位数0.63，弥散约0.2 dex；19个延伸至2Re的星系中识别出6个上升、6个平坦、7个下降旋转曲线；恒星Tully-Fisher关系接近局域关系，视宁度退化会使归一化偏移约0.2 dex。
AI.conclusion: MSA-3D巡天提供了向低质量端扩展的高红移星系动力学样本，证实z~1附近恒星形成盘星系具有广泛的动力学状态和内部质量分布多样性。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们展示了30个恒星形成星系在$0.5<z<1.7$范围内的旋转曲线和内部质量分布，这些星系作为MSA-3D Cycle 1巡天的一部分，由JWST/NIRSpec观测得到。结合空间分辨的电离气体运动学与JWST/NIRCam成像，我们通过正向动力学建模约束了重子和暗物质贡献，星系恒星质量低至$\sim10^{9}M_\odot$。对于主要统计样本中的23个星系，我们发现它们主要是旋转支持的盘，固有速度弥散$σ_0\sim31$-65 km s$^{-1}$，暗物质分数$f_{DM}(R_e)\sim0.1$-0.9范围广泛，中位数为0.63，星系间弥散约$\sim0.2$ dex。这些结果得到了使用恒星质量图和SFR导出的气体分布进行的补充一致性检验的支持。在达到$\gtrsim2R_e$的19个星系中，我们识别出6个上升型、6个平坦型和7个下降型旋转曲线。这些类别定义了一个从旋转主导、暗物质丰富的盘（$V_{rot}/σ_0\approx4$，$f_{DM}\gtrsim0.7$）到更弥散支持、重子质量分布集中在中心的系统（$V_{rot}/σ_0\approx2$，$f_{DM}\lesssim0.55$）的观测排序。恒星Tully-Fisher关系接近在采用的自相似$Λ$CDM标度下演化的局域关系。一个简化的视宁度退化测试在固定$V_c$下将推断的归一化偏移了约0.2 dex，表明空间分辨率对高红移Tully-Fisher测量差异有贡献，但不能完全解释。总体而言，MSA-3D将先前巡天向更低恒星质量扩展，覆盖$9.0 < \log(M_\star/M_\odot) < 11.2$，并强化了$z\sim1$附近的恒星形成盘星系具有广泛的动力学状态和内部质量分布。

title: Cm-wavelength Studies of Molecular Gas and Star Formation at High Redshift with the SKA
comment: Published in Advancing Astrophysics with the SKA II (AASKAII), 2026(arXiv:2606.20366). Report-no: AASKAII/RanWang01. Advancing Astrophysics with the SKA II (AASKAII) outlines the transformative scientific advances that will be enabled by the SKA telescopes
summary: The Square Kilometre Array will be a revolutionary instrument for the study of gas in the distant Universe. At frequencies below ~50 GHz, observations of redshifted emission from low-J transitions of CO, HCN, HCO+, and HNC, etc. provide insight into the kinematics and mass budget of the cold, dense star-forming gas in galaxies. Over the past decade, sensitive imaging using ALMA has detected and resolved the redshifted high-J molecular CO line emission and far-infrared fine structure lines in samples of galaxies over a wide redshift range, shedding light on active star-formation processes at the early epoch of galaxy evolution. In recent years, increasing numbers of young galaxies at high redshift are discovered by JWST, which significantly improved our knowledge of different galaxy populations across cosmic time. In this updated chapter of the SKA science book, we would like to highlight the importance of studies of the low-J molecular lines in high-z galaxies using SKA toward high frequencies, discussing the request of frequency coverage beyond 15 GHz and emphasizing its crucial role in exploring the cold molecular gas content in the young galaxy populations in the early universe and investigating the regions of active-star formation using molecular CO and various dense gas tracers.

AI.tldr: 本文强调了SKA在高频段（>15 GHz）观测高红移星系低阶分子谱线的重要性，特别是研究早期宇宙年轻星系中的冷分子气体含量和活跃恒星形成区域。
AI.motivation: 随着JWST发现越来越多的高红移年轻星系，需要利用SKA的高频观测能力来研究这些早期星系中的冷分子气体，弥补当前观测手段在低阶分子谱线方面的不足。
AI.method: 通过SKA在高频段（>15 GHz）对红移后的CO、HCN、HCO+等低阶分子跃迁线进行观测，结合现有ALMA和JWST的观测数据，综合分析星系中的冷气体分布与恒星形成活动。
AI.result: SKA能够探测早期宇宙年轻星系中的冷分子气体含量，并利用CO及多种致密气体示踪物研究活跃恒星形成区域。
AI.conclusion: SKA超过15 GHz的频率覆盖能力对于研究高红移星系的冷分子气体和恒星形成过程至关重要，是理解早期宇宙星系演化的关键工具。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 平方公里阵列（SKA）将成为研究遥远宇宙中气体的革命性仪器。在低于约50 GHz的频率下，观测来自CO、HCN、HCO+和HNC等分子的低J跃迁的红移发射，可以深入了解星系中冷、致密恒星形成气体的运动学和物质预算。在过去十年中，利用ALMA进行的灵敏成像已经探测并解析了广泛红移范围内星系样本中的红移高J分子CO谱线发射和远红外精细结构谱线，揭示了星系演化早期活跃的恒星形成过程。近年来，JWST发现了越来越多的高红移年轻星系，这显著提高了我们对不同星系种群在整个宇宙时间尺度上的认识。在这份更新的SKA科学书籍章节中，我们希望强调利用SKA在高频方向研究高红移星系中低J分子谱线的重要性，讨论频率覆盖范围超过15 GHz的需求，并强调其在探索早期宇宙年轻星系种群中的冷分子气体含量以及利用分子CO和各种致密气体示踪物研究活跃恒星形成区域方面的关键作用。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要的总结：SKA超过15 GHz的频率覆盖能力对于研究高红移星系的冷分子气体和恒星形成过程至关重要，是理解早期宇宙星系演化的关键工具。

title: Predisposition of galaxy clusters to producing exotic hyperbolic umbilic lensing configurations
comment: 20 pages, 18 figures, accepted for publication in A&A
summary: Strong gravitational lensing is a powerful tool for investigating the universe's large-scale structure and understanding the properties of dark matter and dark energy. The magnification and distortion of distant background sources by cluster lenses have enabled detailed studies of both lens and source populations, making these systems promising probes for precision cosmology. While classical strong-lenses are well understood, much remains to be explored for hyperbolic-umbilic (HU) exotic lenses, which produce unique telescopic effects and uncommon images with potentially very high magnifications. Identifying and quantifying these objects, along with characterising their geometric configurations, could have broad implications for studies of galaxy clusters and lensed galaxy populations. Using parametric cluster mass models, we mapped regions in the source plane where HU exotic images can form and integrate these areas over redshift to define an exotic comoving volume (V_z<10). We validated this approach on confirmed exotic systems (RXJ0437.1+0043 and Abell 1703), then applied it to a sample of 74 cluster models. We show HU-region contours for the most promising clusters, assess both systematic and stochastic uncertainties on exotic area and volume estimates, and confirm that our error remains sufficiently small to support robust conclusions. Next, we explore correlations between six cluster parameters and (V_z<10), finding that pairs of parameters, especially ellipticity with Einstein radius or cuspiness, best distinguish high-(V_z<10) systems. Finally, we estimate that each cluster contributes ~0.125 galaxies to its exotic volume on average (as a conservative lower bound), meaning that observing 19 clusters yields a 90% chance of detecting at least one HU system in a random sample.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了双曲脐点(HU)奇特强引力透镜系统，通过参数化星系团质量模型在源平面绘制HU奇特像形成区域，并定义奇特共动体积(V_z<10)。在验证方法后应用于74个星系团模型，发现椭圆度与爱因斯坦半径或尖度组合最能区分高V_z系统，并估计每个星系团平均贡献约0.125个星系至其奇特体积，观测19个星系团有90%概率探测到至少一个HU系统。
AI.motivation: 经典强引力透镜已被广泛研究，但双曲脐点(HU)奇特透镜系统因其独特的望远镜效应和高放大率潜力尚未被充分探索。识别并量化这些系统及其几何构型，对星系团和透镜星系群研究具有广泛意义。
AI.method: 使用参数化星系团质量模型，在源平面绘制HU奇特像形成区域，并沿红移积分定义奇特共动体积(V_z<10)。在RXJ0437.1+0043和Abell 1703上验证后，应用于74个星系团模型，分析六个星系团参数与V_z<10的相关性，最后通过统计估计探测概率。
AI.result: 展示了最具潜力星系团的HU区域轮廓，系统性和随机性误差均足够小以支持稳健结论。椭圆度与爱因斯坦半径或尖度组合最能区分高V_z系统。每个星系团平均贡献约0.125个星系至其奇特体积，观测19个星系团有90%概率探测到至少一个HU系统。
AI.conclusion: HU奇特透镜系统可被有效识别和量化，且探测所需样本量适中，为未来利用这类系统进行精密宇宙学研究提供了可行路径。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 强引力透镜是研究宇宙大尺度结构以及理解暗物质和暗能量性质的有力工具。星系团透镜对遥远背景源的放大和扭曲效应使得对透镜和源群体的详细研究成为可能，使这些系统成为精密宇宙学有前景的探针。虽然经典强透镜已被充分理解，但对于双曲脐点（HU）奇特透镜，其能产生独特的望远镜效应和罕见的高放大率图像，仍有大量待探索之处。识别并量化这些天体，以及表征它们的几何构型，可能对星系团和透镜星系群的研究产生广泛影响。利用参数化星系团质量模型，我们绘制了源平面中HU奇特图像可能形成的区域，并将这些区域对红移积分，定义了一个奇特共动体积（V_z<10）。我们在已确认的奇特系统（RXJ0437.1+0043 和 Abell 1703）上验证了该方法，然后将其应用于包含74个星系团模型的样本。我们展示了最有希望产生奇特透镜的星系团的HU区域等值线，评估了奇特面积和体积估计中的系统性和随机性不确定性，并确认我们的误差足够小以支持稳健的结论。接下来，我们探索了六个星系团参数与（V_z<10）之间的相关性，发现参数对，特别是椭圆率与爱因斯坦半径或尖度，最能区分高（V_z<10）系统。最后，我们估计每个星系团平均对其奇特体积贡献约0.125个星系（作为保守下限），这意味着观测19个星系团在随机样本中有90%的概率探测到至少一个HU系统。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要的总结：HU奇特透镜系统可被有效识别和量化，且探测所需样本量适中，为未来利用这类系统进行精密宇宙学研究提供了可行路径。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1 : Diagram illustrating the evolution of tangential (red) and radial (green) caustic lines with source redshift and the location of a hyperbolic umbilic (HU) point at the cusp exchange (blue). The dashed circles highlight the cusp-exchange point in the source plane. HU configurations are characterised by the formation of a compact quadruplet of highly magnified images at the cusp exchange, accompanied by an additional counter-image, which motivates the requirement of at least five lensed images. Adapted from Petters et al. ( 2012 ) .
figures.caption_zh: 图1 : 图解说明切向（红色）和径向（绿色）焦散线随源红移的演化，以及在尖点交换处双曲脐点（HU）点（蓝色）的位置。虚线圆圈突出显示了源平面中的尖点交换点。HU构型的特征是在尖点交换处形成由高度放大图像组成的紧凑四重态，并伴随一个额外的反像，这要求至少存在五个透镜图像。改编自 Petters 等人 (2012)。

The close-up highlights shear vectors and \(\kappa+\gamma\) isocontours (dashed black), where radial A3 lines occur where the eigenvalue isocontour and the shear vector are aligned. The yellow contour outlines the multiple-image region of the cluster, computed at an effective source redshift of \(z=100\) to approximate the \(D_{ls}/D_{s}\simeq 1\) limit.

title: Dissecting the Obscured Core of GN20: an Active Galactic Nucleus Outshone by Young Stars
comment: Submitted to A&A (29.05). 12 pages, 4 figures and 2 tables
summary: We investigate the relative contributions of star formation and AGN activity to the total energy budget of GN20, one of the most luminous dusty star-forming galaxies known at $z>4$, through spatially resolved spectral energy distribution decomposition. We perform Bayesian SED fitting with CIGALE on two spatially distinct apertures: the nuclear core (r=0.14", $\sim$1kpc physical) and the full galaxy (r=1.4", 9.9 kpc), combining JWST/NIRCam and MIRI broadband imaging, JWST/NIRSpec PRISM IFU pseudo-continuum photometry spanning 42 wavelength bins across rest-frame $0.12$--$1.05μ$m, and archival HST and millimeter interferometry data from NOEMA and PdBI. The integrated SED is dominated by stellar-heated dust, with only a marginal AGN contribution at galaxy-wide scales ($f_\mathrm{AGN}^\mathrm{int}=0.09\pm0.02$). The nuclear core, however, requires a significant AGN component ($f_\mathrm{AGN}=0.34\pm0.05$) to account for a mid-infrared excess at rest-frame $\sim$2.5--3.6$μ$m characteristic of AGN-heated torus dust. The AGN accounts for $\sim34\%$ of the nuclear infrared luminosity but only $\sim9\%$ of the total integrated $L_\mathrm{IR}$, explaining its weak signature in integrated diagnostics and its consistency with existing upper limits from Spitzer spectroscopy. The inferred black hole mass places GN20 within the local $M_\mathrm{BH}$--$M_\mathrm{bulge}$ relation at the Eddington limit, and in the overmassive regime at sub-Eddington accretion rates, suggesting early and rapid black hole assembly concurrent with the dominant starburst. GN20 exemplifies a class of systems where nuclear-scale SED decomposition, enabled by the angular resolution and infrared sensitivity of JWST, is the only means to uncover a buried AGN overwhelmed by galaxy-wide star formation.

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们通过空间分辨的谱能量分布分解，研究了恒星形成和活动星系核活动对GN20（已知红移$z>4$的最明亮尘埃恒星形成星系之一）总能量预算的相对贡献。我们使用CIGALE对两个空间上不同的孔径进行了贝叶斯SED拟合：核区（r=0.14"，物理尺度约1kpc）和整个星系（r=1.4"，9.9 kpc），结合了JWST/NIRCam和MIRI宽带成像、JWST/NIRSpec PRISM IFU伪连续谱测光（覆盖静止框架$0.12$--$1.05μ$m的42个波长区间），以及来自NOEMA和PdBI的HST和毫米波干涉数据。积分SED由恒星加热的尘埃主导，在星系尺度上AGN贡献很小（$f_\mathrm{AGN}^\mathrm{int}=0.09\pm0.02$）。然而，核区需要一个显著的AGN成分（$f_\mathrm{AGN}=0.34\pm0.05$）来解释静止框架约$\sim$2.5--3.6$μ$m处的中红外过剩，这是AGN加热的环状尘埃的特征。AGN占核区红外光度的约$\sim34\%$，但仅占积分总$L_\mathrm{IR}$的约$\sim9\%$，这解释了其在积分诊断中的弱信号及其与Spitzer光谱现有上限的一致性。推断的黑洞质量使GN20在爱丁顿极限下位于局域$M_\mathrm{BH}$--$M_\mathrm{bulge}$关系上，在亚爱丁顿吸积率下则处于超大质量区域，表明早期快速的黑洞并合与主导的星暴同时发生。GN20代表了这样一类系统：只有通过JWST的角分辨率和红外灵敏度进行核尺度SED分解，才能揭示被星系尺度恒星形成完全掩盖的隐藏AGN。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有总结：GN20代表了这样一类系统：只有通过JWST的高角分辨率和红外灵敏度进行核尺度SED分解，才能揭示被星系尺度恒星形成完全掩盖的隐藏AGN。

title: Cosmological Galaxy Formation Modelling in the Era of the Square Kilometre Array
comment: Published in Advancing Astrophysics with the SKAII(AASKAII),2026(arXiv:2606.20366). Report-no:AASKAII/Lagos01. Advancing Astrophysics with the SKAII (AASKAII) outlines the transformative scientific advances that will be enabled by the SKA telescopes
summary: Over the past decade, galaxy formation simulations have advanced dramatically, transforming our ability to model the interstellar medium (ISM) and predict galaxies' radio emission. Yet the challenge of bridging physical scales--from sub-parsec star formation to gigaparsec cosmic structure--remains. The Square Kilometre Array (SKA) will map the cold gas and radio continuum of galaxies across cosmic time, demanding models that couple physical realism with cosmological reach. This chapter reviews the state-of-the-art in cosmological galaxy formation modelling in preparation for the SKA. We outline progress in simulating atomic hydrogen (HI), molecular gas, and radio continuum emission from both star formation and active galactic nuclei, highlighting how cosmological hydrodynamical simulations and semi-analytic models now jointly reproduce many observed gas properties. We emphasise the need for a coordinated, ``wedding-cake'' strategy that unites simulations of different scales, for forward modelling of observables to ensure fair comparison with data, and for the integration of new technologies such as AI-driven emulators to accelerate progress. Together, these efforts will enable theoretical models to both interpret and guide SKA science, turning simulations from passive interpreters into active engines for discovery.

artifacts.abstract_zh: 在过去的十年中，星系形成模拟取得了显著进展，极大地提升了我们对星际介质（ISM）进行建模以及预测星系射电辐射的能力。然而，连接不同物理尺度——从亚秒差距的恒星形成到吉秒差距的宇宙结构——的挑战依然存在。平方公里阵列（SKA）将绘制宇宙时间尺度上星系的冷气体和射电连续谱，这要求模型能够将物理真实性与宇宙学尺度相结合。本章回顾了为准备SKA而进行的宇宙学星系形成建模的最新进展。我们概述了在模拟原子氢（HI）、分子气体以及来自恒星形成和活动星系核的射电连续谱辐射方面取得的进展，强调了宇宙学流体动力学模拟和半解析模型现在如何共同再现许多观测到的气体性质。我们强调需要一种协调的“千层蛋糕”策略，该策略联合不同尺度的模拟，对可观测物理量进行正向建模以确保与数据的公平比较，并整合如人工智能驱动的仿真器等新技术以加速进展。这些共同努力将使理论模型能够解释和指导SKA的科学目标，将模拟从被动的解释者转变为主动的发现引擎。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有总结：通过协调跨尺度模拟、正向建模和AI技术，理论模型将从被动的解释工具转变为主动的发现引擎，支撑SKA的科学目标。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Modified from Crain and van de Voort ( 2023 ) to show the processes that are happening at different scales and place them into the context of what is directly simulated and what is modelled via so called “subgrid physics models”. The exact transition of when one goes from directly simulating to modelling depends on the tools at hand. The arrows at the top show the regions that are typically directly simulated in different techniques based on the latest models and simulations.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：修改自Crain and van de Voort (2023)，展示了在不同尺度上发生的过程，并将它们置于直接模拟的内容和通过所谓的“子网格物理模型”建模的内容的背景下。从直接模拟过渡到建模的确切点取决于可用的工具。顶部的箭头显示了基于最新模型和模拟的不同技术中通常直接模拟的区域。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: The distribution of gas particles or cells in the temperature vs density plane at \(z=0\) in three different cosmological hydrodynamical simulations. Eagle (left panel) (Crain et al. , 2017 ) lacked an explicit model of the ISM and instead imposed an equation of state. Here, pixels are coloured by the mass fraction, showing that most of the gas mass in the \(z=0\) universe is in the form of hot, low-density gas. FIREbox (middle panel) (Feldmann et al. , 2023 ) uses cooling tables to allow the gas to cool down to \(10\) K and account for the HII, HI, H 2 partition in post-processing. Here, pixels are coloured by the fraction of HII (red), HI (green) and H 2 (blue) mass. Colibre (right panel) (Schaye et al. , 2026 ) includes explicit on-the-fly non-equilibrium chemistry and cooling that explicitly tracks the HII, HI and H 2 species. Here, pixels are coloured by the fraction of HII (blue), HI (red) and H 2 (green) mass. The middle and right panel are examples of the recent progress in the field.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：在三种不同的宇宙学流体动力学模拟中，\(z=0\) 时气体粒子或单元在温度-密度平面上的分布。Eagle（左图）(Crain et al., 2017) 缺乏明确的ISM模型，而是施加了一个状态方程。此处，像素按质量分数着色，显示 \(z=0\) 宇宙中大部分气体质量以热、低密度气体的形式存在。FIREbox（中图）(Feldmann et al., 2023) 使用冷却表使气体冷却到 \(10\) K，并在后处理中考虑HII、HI、H\(_2\) 的分配。此处，像素按HII（红色）、HI（绿色）和H\(_2\)（蓝色）质量分数着色。Colibre（右图）(Schaye et al., 2026) 包含明确的即时非平衡化学和冷却，明确追踪HII、HI和H\(_2\) 物种。此处，像素按HII（蓝色）、HI（红色）和H\(_2\)（绿色）质量分数着色。中图和右图是该领域近期进展的例子。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Left panels: Joint distribution of HI column density ( \(N_{{HI}}\) ) and velocity dispersion ( \(\sigma\) ). Pairs of values are drawn from corresponding pixels in the \(0^{{th}}\) and \(2^{{nd}}\) moment maps of high- ( \(\sim 25^{\) ; top row – HR) and low-resolution ( \(\sim 65^{\) ; bottom row – LR) spectral cubes obtained with MeerKAT (left column) for a sample of \(5\) \({L}_{\star}\) galaxies. The centre and right columns show the same measurement for samples of galaxies of similar mass drawn from the TNG50 and FIRE-2 simulation suites, respectively. Simulated galaxies have been ‘observed’ at the same resolution and sensitivity as the corresponding MeerKAT observations. These simulations have much more gas at low column density ( \(N_{{HI}} 30\,{km}\,{s}^{-1}\) ) at higher column ( \(N_{{HI}}>10^{19}\,{cm}^{-2}\) ) that is also not observed. (Reproduced from Fig. 5 in Marasco et al. , 2025 .) Right panel: Cumulative HI flux as a function of projected distance for MeerKAT galaxies, compared with selected TNG50 and FIRE-2 galaxies (Reproduced from Fig. 7 in Marasco et al. 2025 ).
figures.caption_zh: 图3：左图：HI柱密度 (\(N_{{HI}}\)) 和速度弥散度 (\(\sigma\)) 的联合分布。数值对取自使用MeerKAT（左列）对 \(5\) 个 \({L}_{\star}\) 星系样本进行高分辨率（\(\sim 25^{\)；上行 – HR）和低分辨率（\(\sim 65^{\)；下行 – LR）光谱立方体的 \(0^{{th}}\) 和 \(2^{{nd}}\) 矩图中的对应像素。中列和右列分别显示了从TNG50和FIRE-2模拟套件中抽取的相似质量星系样本的相同测量结果。模拟星系已在与相应MeerKAT观测相同的分辨率和灵敏度下被“观测”。这些模拟在低柱密度 (\(N_{{HI}} 30\,{km}\,{s}^{-1}\)) 处有更多气体，这也是未观测到的。（复制自Marasco et al., 2025 的图5。）右图：MeerKAT星系的累积HI通量作为投影距离的函数，与选定的TNG50和FIRE-2星系进行比较（复制自Marasco et al. 2025 的图7）。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: A compilation of observed galaxies collected by Santos-Santos et al. ( 2020 ) in the space of \(\eta_{{rot}}\) and \(\eta_{{bar}}\) . The \(\eta_{{rot}}\) parameter is the ratio of the rotation curve amplitude at a suitably chosen ‘inner’ radius ( \(V_{{fid}}\) ) and its maximum ( \(V_{{max}}\) ), and serves as a proxy for the rotation curve shape: a higher (lower) value of \(\eta_{{rot}}\) is suggestive of a dark matter cusp (core). The horizontal grey line marks the expectation for an NFW halo model. The \(\eta_{{bar}}\) parameter is a measure of the influence of the baryonic (stellar & gas) components of the galaxy on its kinematics within the same inner aperture. Higher \(\eta_{{bar}}\) values correspond to more centrally baryon-dominated galaxies. Points are coloured by \(V_{{max}}\) . For low mass galaxies ( \(V_{{max}}\lesssim 100\,{km}\,{s}^{-1}\) ;black-orange points) an anti-correlation with substantial scatter between \(\eta_{{rot}}\) and \(\eta_{{bar}}\) emerges. This trend is challenging to explain and provides a stringent test of theories proposed to resolve the cusp-core discrepancy. (Reproduced from Fig. 4 in Santos-Santos et al. , 2020 .)
figures.caption_zh: 图4：Santos-Santos et al. (2020) 收集的观测星系在 \(\eta_{{rot}}\) 和 \(\eta_{{bar}}\) 空间中的汇编。\(\eta_{{rot}}\) 参数是在适当选择的“内部”半径 (\(V_{{fid}}\)) 处的旋转曲线幅度与其最大值 (\(V_{{max}}\)) 的比值，并作为旋转曲线形状的代理：\(\eta_{{rot}}\) 的较高（较低）值暗示暗物质尖点（核）。水平灰线标记了NFW晕模型的预期值。\(\eta_{{bar}}\) 参数是星系的重子（恒星和气体）成分在同一内部孔径内对其动力学影响的度量。较高的 \(\eta_{{bar}}\) 值对应于更中心重子主导的星系。点按 \(V_{{max}}\) 着色。对于低质量星系 (\(V_{{max}}\lesssim 100\,{km}\,{s}^{-1}\)；黑-橙色点)，\(\eta_{{rot}}\) 和 \(\eta_{{bar}}\) 之间出现了具有显著离散度的反相关。这一趋势难以解释，并为旨在解决尖点-核差异的理论提供了严格的检验。（复制自Santos-Santos et al., 2020 的图4。）

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: The HI velocity width function is a strong constraint on the halo mass function of gas rich galaxies and therefore a potential test of cosmological models, but faithfully modelling the galaxy distribution in HI mass ( \(M_{{HI}}\) ) and line width ( \(w_{50}\) ) requires capturing the complexity of cold gas dynamics. A detailed forward model of the spectra of galaxies in the GALFORM semi-analytic model (green line, adapted from fig. 4 in Brooks et al. , 2023 ) greatly overpredicts (underpredicts) the number counts of low- \(w_{{50}}\) (high- \(w_{50}\) ) galaxies in the ALFALFA survey (open crosses; Haynes et al. , 2018 ) . However, a similar forward modelling applied to a different semi-analytic model ( Shark ; Chauhan et al. 2019 , shown for two \(N\) -body boxes medi and micro, representing lower and higher resolution, respectively) is in much better agreement with the data, showing how sensitive this is to the underlying baryon physics. Hydrodynamical models like Eagle (purple line, reproduced from ‘EAGLE25’ curve in fig. 4 of Oman et al. , 2024 ) capture the non-linear relationship between halo mass and \(w_{50}\) – and especially its scatter – arguably more accurately (see fig. 7 in Oman et al. , 2024 ) .
figures.caption_zh: 图5：HI速度宽度函数是对富气星系晕质量函数的强约束，因此是宇宙学模型的潜在检验，但忠实地模拟HI质量 (\(M_{{HI}}\)) 和谱线宽度 (\(w_{50}\)) 中的星系分布需要捕捉冷气体动力学的复杂性。GALFORM半解析模型中星系光谱的详细正向模型（绿线，改编自Brooks et al., 2023 的图4）极大地高估（低估）了ALFALFA巡天（开放十字；Haynes et al., 2018）中低 \(w_{{50}}\) （高 \(w_{50}\) ）星系的计数。然而，应用于不同半解析模型（Shark；Chauhan et al. 2019，显示为两个 \(N\) 体盒子medi和micro，分别代表较低和较高分辨率）的类似正向建模与数据吻合得更好，这表明这对底层重子物理非常敏感。像Eagle（紫色线，复制自Oman et al., 2024 图4中的‘EAGLE25’曲线）这样的流体动力学模型捕捉了晕质量与 \(w_{50}\) 之间的非线性关系——尤其是其离散度——可以说更准确（见Oman et al., 2024 的图7）。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6: Taken from Figures 4 and 7 in Gensior et al. ( 2024 ) . The maps on the left show face-on projection of the HI surface density for four example galaxies in the EMP- Pathfinder simulations employing a constant star formation efficiency (top) and an efficiency that depends on the turbulence of the ISM (bottom). The plot on the right shows radial profiles of the HI disc scale heights of the simulated galaxies, showing that the EMP- Pathfinder simulations employing a constant star formation efficiency produces HI discs that are substantially thicker than those observed in the nearby universe (black symbols with errorbars).
figures.caption_zh: 图6：取自Gensior et al. (2024) 的图4和图7。左侧的图显示了EMP-Pathfinder模拟中四个示例星系采用恒定恒星形成效率（上）和依赖于ISM湍流的效率（下）时的HI面密度正面投影。右侧的图显示了模拟星系HI盘标高（disc scale heights）的径向轮廓，表明采用恒定恒星形成效率的EMP-Pathfinder模拟产生的HI盘明显比近邻宇宙中观测到的（带误差棒的黑点）更厚。

figures.caption_en: Figure 7: Figure 1 in Stevens et al. ( 2019b ) , showing the projected HI column density of a galaxy cluster of mass \(1.7\times 10^{14}\,M_{\odot}\) in TNG at \(z=0\) . Circles indicate the equivalent physical beam size used to measure HI masses considering the xGASS survey (Catinella et al. , 2018 ) . Circles are coloured by the stellar mass of the galaxy they are centred on. The central galaxy of the cluster is indicated by red circle.
figures.caption_zh: 图7：Stevens et al. (2019b) 的图1，显示了TNG中 \(z=0\) 时质量为 \(1.7\times 10^{14}\,M_{\odot}\) 的星系团的投影HI柱密度。圆圈表示考虑xGASS巡天（Catinella et al., 2018）时用于测量HI质量的等效物理波束大小。圆圈按其中心星系的恒星质量着色。星团的中心星系由红色圆圈指示。

figures.caption_en: Figure 8: The HI mass function at \(z=0\) (solid lines), \(z=1\) (dashed lines), and \(z=2\) (dotted lines) in \(3\) semi-analytic models ( Shark , GAEA, GALFORM) and \(3\) cosmological hydrodynamical simulations ( Eagle , TNG and Simba), as labelled in each panel. Observations at \(z\approx 0\) from Zwaan et al. ( 2005 ) and Jones et al. ( 2018 ) are shown as grey circles and crosses, respectively; while the inferred HI mass function at \(z\approx 1\) from convolving stacked spectra with measured optical luminosity functions at \(z\approx 1\) (Chowdhury et al. , 2024 ) are shown as a grey band. Eagle and Simba predict the number densities of galaxies to increase with increasing redshift, while the other simulations predict the opposite trend. None of the simulations appear to reproduce the level of increase in number density inferred from the \(z\approx 1\) observations.
figures.caption_zh: 图8：在 \(z=0\) （实线）、\(z=1\) （虚线）和 \(z=2\) （点线）处的HI质量函数，分别来自 \(3\) 个半解析模型（Shark, GAEA, GALFORM）和 \(3\) 个宇宙学流体动力学模拟（Eagle, TNG和Simba），如每个面板中所标注。来自Zwaan et al. (2005) 和Jones et al. (2018) 的 \(z\approx 0\) 观测分别显示为灰色圆圈和十字；而通过将堆叠光谱与 \(z\approx 1\) 处测量的光学光度函数卷积推断出的 \(z\approx 1\) 处HI质量函数（Chowdhury et al., 2024）显示为灰色带。Eagle和Simba预测星系的数密度随红移增加而增加，而其他模拟则预测相反的趋势。没有一个模拟似乎能再现从 \(z\approx 1\) 观测推断出的数密度增加水平。

title: Little Red Dots as Intermediate Mass, Super-Eddington Engines: Insights from Type IIn Supernovae and The 1837-1856 Great Eruption of $η$ Carinae
comment: Submitted to the Open Journal of Astrophysics. Comments warmly welcomed
summary: JWST's Little Red Dots (LRDs) display a unique constellation of features that do not occur simultaneously in any other class of galaxies or AGN. Here we observe that many of these features find parallels in the 19th century Great Eruption (GE) of $η$ Carinae and a sub-class of supernovae (Type IIn). Drawing on these stellar phenomena -- outflows trapped by dense circumstellar gas envelopes -- we sketch a possible scenario for LRDs. Outflows from the central engine produce an enshrouding envelope of gas that may be thought of as a slow wind. This dense wind and its enormous extent produce an opacity so high that a pseudo-photosphere forms within the wind, obscuring the central engine and manifesting as a blackbody-like continuum. Radiation from the buried engine powers the system. The engine may also launch fast winds that crash into the existing envelope to generate shocks. Lines form within the wind above the photosphere -- electron scattering and absorption in the clumpy (ionized + neutral) medium account for broad wings and P-Cygni cores. A key implication is that inferences of ``overmassive black holes" may be interpreting this wind-like physics as a virial broad-line region. We propose an escape velocity argument to constrain the mass of the engine, which yields $M<10^{5} M_\odot$ for the typical LRD. The lack of variability and low surface gravity of the photosphere provide further support for intermediate mass ($M\approx10^{3-6} M_\odot$), but very luminous super-Eddington ($L_{\rm{bol}}/L_{\rm{edd}}\gtrsim5$) systems harboring a supermassive star or intermediate mass black hole. Paralleling the evolution of IIn SNe, dust production in the envelope may mark the beginnings of classical AGN. This paper explores a possible self-consistent explanation for the entire life-cycle of LRDs, from their enshrouding in dense gas to their fates as seeds of massive black holes.

AI.tldr: 论文提出LRDs（小红点）与19世纪海山二的大爆发及IIn型超新星相似，认为其核心被致密星风包裹，形成伪光球层，解释其光谱特征。研究发现LRD中心引擎质量约为10³⁻⁶ M☉，处于超爱丁顿状态，可能孕育着超大质量恒星或中等质量黑洞。
AI.motivation: JWST发现的LRDs具有独特且无法用现有星系或AGN类别解释的特征组合，亟需新的理论框架来解释其物理本质。
AI.method: 类比海山二大爆发和IIn型超新星的星风-包层相互作用机制，构建LRD的致密星风包裹模型，并通过逃逸速度论证和光球层性质约束中心天体质量。
AI.result: LRD中心引擎质量小于10⁵ M☉，典型值为10³⁻⁶ M☉，处于超高爱丁顿比率（≥5）状态；伪光球层、电子散射和吸收机制可解释其连续谱和谱线特征。
AI.conclusion: LRDs可能代表超大质量恒星或中等质量黑洞的早期演化阶段，其星风包层中的尘埃产生可能标志着经典AGN的起源，为超大质量黑洞的种子形成提供自洽解释。

artifacts.abstract_zh: JWST的“小红点”（LRDs）展现了一组独特的特征，这些特征在任何其他类别的星系或活动星系核（AGN）中都不会同时出现。在此，我们观察到这些特征中的许多与19世纪船底座η星的大爆发（GE）以及一类超新星（IIn型）有相似之处。借鉴这些恒星现象——被致密星周气体包层束缚的星风——我们勾勒出LRDs的一种可能情景。中心引擎产生的星风形成一个包裹的气体包层，可视为慢速星风。这种致密星风及其巨大尺度产生了极高的不透明度，以至于在星风内部形成了一个伪光球，遮蔽了中心引擎，并表现为类似黑体的连续谱。被掩埋的引擎发出的辐射为整个系统提供能量。引擎还可能发射快速星风，撞击现有包层产生激波。谱线在光球上方的星风中形成——电子在团块状（电离+中性）介质中的散射和吸收解释了宽翼和P-Cygni核心。一个关键含义是，对“超大质量黑洞”的推断可能错误地将这种星风物理解释为维里化的宽线区。我们提出一个逃逸速度论证来约束引擎质量，对于典型的LRD，这给出M<10^5 M_⊙。光球缺乏光变和低表面引力进一步支持中等质量（M≈10^{3-6} M_⊙）但非常明亮的超爱丁顿（L_bol/L_edd≳5）系统，其中包含一颗超大质量恒星或中等质量黑洞。与IIn型超新星演化相似，包层中的尘埃产生可能标志着经典AGN的开端。本文探索了LRD整个生命周期的一种可能自洽解释，从它们被致密气体包裹到最终成为大质量黑洞的种子。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有总结，LRDs可能代表超大质量恒星或中等质量黑洞的早期演化阶段，其星风包层中的尘埃产生可能标志着经典AGN的起源，为超大质量黑洞的种子形成提供自洽解释。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: LRDs, Type IIn SNe, and the GE span 4 dex in bolometric luminosity ( \(L_{{bol}}\) ) but cluster in effective temperature ( \(T_{{eff}}\) ) . The GE (blue star) displays a blackbody-like continuum of \(T_{{eff}}\approx 5000-6000\) K (Rest et al. , 2012 ; Smith et al. , 2018 ) similar to the \(\approx 500\) Type IIn SNe (dark orange) compiled in Hiramatsu et al. ( 2024 ) and LRDs (red dots) from de Graaff et al. ( 2025a ) . The Hiramatsu et al. ( 2024 ) IIn SNe compilation is represented at peak luminosity by adopting a flat bolometric correction of \(L_{{bol}}/L_{{opt}}=1.9\) . The dashed gray lines depict \(L_{{bol}}=4\pi R_{{eff}}^{2}\sigma_{{SB}}T_{{eff}}^{4}\) at fixed \(R_{{eff}}\) . The clustering in \(T_{{eff}}\) occurs at the temperatures where hydrogen recombination produces a steep opacity gradient, self-regulating the pseudo-photospheres (or “recombination photospheres”) of these objects (e.g., Davidson, 1987 ; Dessart and Hillier, 2011 ; Owocki and Shaviv, 2016 ; Liu et al. , 2025a ; Kido et al. , 2025 ) .
figures.caption_zh: 图1: LRDs、IIn型超新星和GE在热光度 ( \(L_{{bol}}\) ) 上跨越4个数量级，但在有效温度 ( \(T_{{eff}}\) ) 上聚集。GE（蓝色星）显示出类似黑体的连续谱，\(T_{{eff}}\approx 5000-6000\) K（Rest et al. , 2012 ; Smith et al. , 2018 ），与Hiramatsu et al. ( 2024 ) 汇编的约500个IIn型超新星（深橙色）和de Graaff et al. ( 2025a ) 的LRDs（红点）相似。Hiramatsu et al. ( 2024 ) 的IIn型超新星汇编在峰值光度处采用平坦的辐射改正 \(L_{{bol}}/L_{{opt}}=1.9\) 。灰色虚线描绘了在固定 \(R_{{eff}}\) 下的 \(L_{{bol}}=4\pi R_{{eff}}^{2}\sigma_{{SB}}T_{{eff}}^{4}\) 。\(T_{{eff}}\) 的聚集发生在氢复合产生陡峭不透明度梯度的温度处，这些物体通过自调节伪光球（或“复合光球”）（例如，Davidson, 1987 ; Dessart and Hillier, 2011 ; Owocki and Shaviv, 2016 ; Liu et al. , 2025a ; Kido et al. , 2025 ）。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: The remarkable similarity in H \(\alpha\) line profiles of the GE, Type IIn SNe, and LRDs . Top: In the CSM interaction phase of the GE, the line is characterized by electron scattered wings and blue-shifted Balmer absorption. Profile reconstructed from parameters reported in Smith et al. ( 2018 ) , matched in resolution and noise properties to the JWST/NIRSpec LRD spectrum in the bottom panel. Center: Type IIn SNe (example from Kankare et al. 2012 ; X-SHOOTER spectrum with \(R\approx 8800\) ) show very similar line profiles for large periods in their evolution – narrow lines relative to typical Type II SNe (hence the “n” in Type IIn), Balmer absorption, and electron scattering wings. Indeed, the GE has been modeled as a “scaled down” version of such SNe (Smith, 2013 ) . Bottom: LRDs show similar line profiles (represented here by GN-9771; Torralba et al. 2025 ), which in this work we interpret by drawing on the relatively well-understood physics of enshrouded eruptions.
figures.caption_zh: 图2: GE、IIn型超新星和LRDs的H \(\alpha\) 谱线轮廓具有显著相似性。顶部：在GE的CSM相互作用阶段，谱线以电子散射翼和蓝移的巴尔默吸收为特征。轮廓根据Smith et al. ( 2018 ) 报告的参数重建，分辨率和噪声特性与底部面板中的JWST/NIRSpec LRD光谱匹配。中部：IIn型超新星（示例来自Kankare et al. 2012 ; X-SHOOTER光谱，\(R\approx 8800\) ）在其演化的大部分时期显示出非常相似的谱线轮廓——相对于典型的II型超新星，谱线较窄（因此得名IIn型），有巴尔默吸收和电子散射翼。事实上，GE已被建模为这类超新星的“缩小版”（Smith, 2013 ）。底部：LRDs显示出相似的谱线轮廓（此处以GN-9771为代表；Torralba et al. 2025 ），在本文中，我们借鉴对包裹喷发相对充分理解的物理来解释这些轮廓。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Subtle trends in Balmer series line profiles are shared between LRDs and IIn SNe . Top: Peak-normalized, continuum-subtracted Balmer lines are shown for GN-9771 (Torralba et al. , 2025 ) and SN2009kn (Kankare et al. , 2012 ) . Bottom: Following Matthee et al. ( 2026 ) , a model for the exponential wings (and host galaxy in the case of the LRD) is subtracted from the data. This leaves behind a P-Cygni-like profile, with the trough of H \(\beta\) dipping lower than H \(\alpha\) . This has been successfully modeled in IIn SNe (e.g., Dessart et al. , 2009 ) as arising in a partially ionized medium where H \(\beta\) forms deeper than H \(\alpha\) . The deeper forming line sees a larger absorbing column of H 1 with \(n=2\) level atoms. Other trends in the velocity offsets as well as electron scattering wings across the Balmer series are shared between IIn SNe and LRDs, suggesting very similar radiative transfer processes (e.g., Dessart et al. , 2009 ; Brazzini et al. , 2025 ; Matthee et al. , 2026 ) . Note that the feature at \(\approx 3000\) km s -1 in the SN2009kn spectrum is due to Fe 2 (see Fig. 5 ).
figures.caption_zh: 图3: 巴尔默系谱线轮廓的细微趋势在LRDs和IIn型超新星之间共享。顶部：显示了GN-9771（Torralba et al. , 2025 ）和SN2009kn（Kankare et al. , 2012 ）的峰值归一化、连续谱减除后的巴尔默线。底部：遵循Matthee et al. ( 2026 ) ，从数据中减除了指数翼（以及LRD情况下的宿主星系）模型。这留下了一个类似P-Cygni的轮廓，其中H \(\beta\) 的槽比H \(\alpha\) 更低。这在IIn型超新星中已被成功建模（例如，Dessart et al. , 2009 ），源于部分电离介质中H \(\beta\) 比H \(\alpha\) 形成更深。形成更深的谱线看到更大的H I吸收柱密度，其中包含 \(n=2\) 能级的原子。巴尔默系中速度偏移和电子散射翼的其他趋势在IIn型超新星和LRDs之间共享，表明非常相似的辐射转移过程（例如，Dessart et al. , 2009 ; Brazzini et al. , 2025 ; Matthee et al. , 2026 ）。注意，SN2009kn光谱中约3000 km s -1处的特征来自Fe 2（见图5）。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Electron scattering explains broad lines in IIn SNe (and LRDs) . Models from Dessart et al. ( 2009 ) designed to reproduce SN1994W are shown for illustration. The degree of electron scattering increases down the Balmer series. This is exactly what is observed in LRDs, where H \(\beta\) consistently shows broader exponential wings than H \(\alpha\) (see Fig. 3 ; e.g., Brazzini et al. , 2025 ; Rusakov et al. , 2026 ; Matthee et al. , 2026 ) . The broadening has no information about kinematics (e.g., due to a virial broad-line region) and is produced entirely by radiative transfer.
figures.caption_zh: 图4: 电子散射解释了IIn型超新星（和LRDs）中的宽谱线。展示了Dessart et al. ( 2009 ) 为再现SN1994W而设计的模型。电子散射程度沿巴尔默系向下增加。这正是在LRDs中观察到的，其中H \(\beta\) 始终显示出比H \(\alpha\) 更宽的指数翼（见图3；例如，Brazzini et al. , 2025 ; Rusakov et al. , 2026 ; Matthee et al. , 2026 ）。展宽不包含任何运动学信息（例如，来自维里化的宽线区），完全由辐射转移产生。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: LRD-like pseudo-photospheric features highlighted in SN2009kn (orange; \(R\approx 8800\ (5500)\) at \(\gtrsim 5500\) Å ( \(\lesssim 5500\) Å); Kankare et al. 2012 ). Top: The overall continuum shape at \(\gtrsim 4500\) Å is well-described by a single-temperature blackbody akin to LRDs (e.g., de Graaff et al. , 2025a ; Sun et al. , 2026 ) . LRDs have sharper Balmer breaks than observed in SNe, but it is interesting to note that a Balmer break and a rollover in the continuum is apparent. Bottom: Quintessential “stellar” absorption features observed in LRDs such as Ca H & K absorption (left; e.g., D’Eugenio et al. 2025b ) and the Calcium triplet (right; e.g., Lin et al. 2026a ) are highlighted in these panels. The Fe 2 forest (center; e.g., Torralba et al. 2025 ) and O 1 (right; e.g., Tripodi et al. 2025 ) are relatively uncommon among galaxies/AGN but are ubiquitous among Type IIn SNe and LRDs. Note that the P-Cygni absorption is more apparent than in typical LRDs – there is no host galaxy infilling, and the velocity offset of absorption from line-center is larger (see e.g., Fig. 2 in H \(\alpha\) ).
figures.caption_zh: 图5: SN2009kn中突出的类似LRD的伪光球特征（橙色；在 \(\gtrsim 5500\) Å ( \(\lesssim 5500\) Å) 处 \(R\approx 8800\ (5500)\) ；Kankare et al. 2012 ）。顶部：在 \(\gtrsim 4500\) Å处的整体连续谱形状可由类似LRDs的单温度黑体很好地描述（例如，de Graaff et al. , 2025a ; Sun et al. , 2026 ）。LRDs的巴尔默跳变比在超新星中观察到的更尖锐，但有趣的是，可以明显看到巴尔默跳变和连续谱的滚降。底部：在LRDs中观察到的典型“恒星”吸收特征，如Ca H & K吸收（左；例如，D’Eugenio et al. 2025b ）和钙三重线（右；例如，Lin et al. 2026a ），在这些面板中被突出显示。Fe 2森林（中；例如，Torralba et al. 2025 ）和O 1（右；例如，Tripodi et al. 2025 ）在星系/AGN中相对罕见，但在IIn型超新星和LRDs中普遍存在。注意，P-Cygni吸收比典型LRDs更明显——没有宿主星系填充，且吸收相对于谱线中心的速度偏移更大（例如，参见图2中的H \(\alpha\) ）。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6: Phases of Type IIn SNe evolution may help interpret sub-classes of LRDs. Left: The initial shock breakout or “flash” phase of IIn SNe (blue; Ihanec et al. 2024 ) is marked by high ionization lines such as He 2 with the Balmer lines showing no absorption. These are the defining features of the bluest LRDs (e.g., Matthee et al. , 2026 ; Brazzini et al. , 2026 ) . In the much longer-lived interaction phase (orange; Kankare et al. 2012 ), the Balmer lines have P-Cygni profiles and high ionization lines are absent, reminiscent of typical LRDs. Right: An H \(\beta\) spectrum of the flash phase (Shivvers et al. , 2015 ) is contrasted against an archetypal blue LRD, GS-3073 (e.g., Übler et al. , 2023 ; Brazzini et al. , 2026 ; Matthee et al. , 2026 ) . The Keck/HIRES spectrum is degraded to the JWST/NIRSpec resolution for the comparison. The lines both have extremely narrow cores with broad electron scattering wings – broader in the case of the SNe whose “cold wind” is more ionized. There is no sign of Balmer absorption (contrast against bottom-center panel of Fig. 5 above).
figures.caption_zh: 图6: IIn型超新星演化的阶段可能有助于解释LRDs的子类。左：IIn型超新星的初始激波突破或“闪”阶段（蓝色；Ihanec et al. 2024 ）以高电离谱线如He 2为标志，巴尔默线没有吸收。这些是最蓝LRDs的定义特征（例如，Matthee et al. , 2026 ; Brazzini et al. , 2026 ）。在持续时间长得多的相互作用阶段（橙色；Kankare et al. 2012 ），巴尔默线具有P-Cygni轮廓，高电离谱线消失，让人联想到典型的LRDs。右：闪阶段的H \(\beta\) 光谱（Shivvers et al. , 2015 ）与一个典型的蓝色LRD GS-3073（例如，Übler et al. , 2023 ; Brazzini et al. , 2026 ; Matthee et al. , 2026 ）进行对比。Keck/HIRES光谱被降质到JWST/NIRSpec分辨率以进行比较。两条谱线都具有极窄的核心和宽的电子散射翼——在超新星中更宽，因为其“冷星风”电离度更高。没有巴尔默吸收的迹象（与上面图5的中下方面板对比）。

figures.caption_en: Figure 7: The MIR spectrum of Type IIn SNe may help illuminate the MIR of LRDs. We show an illustrative fit to SN2010jl (Andrews et al. , 2011 ) with the typical components included in such modeling (e.g., DerKacy et al. , 2026 ; Medler et al. , 2025 ) . The key features in the MIR include a blackbody representing the pseudo-photosphere ( \(T_{{eff}}=7300\) K; gray), free-free emission ( \(T=20,000\) K; purple), Carbon dust ( \(T=550\) K; dark orange), and Silicate dust ( \(T=350\) K; green).
figures.caption_zh: 图7: IIn型超新星的中红外光谱可能有助于揭示LRDs的中红外特征。我们展示了对SN2010jl（Andrews et al. , 2011 ）的示例性拟合，包含此类建模中的典型成分（例如，DerKacy et al. , 2026 ; Medler et al. , 2025 ）。中红外的主要特征包括代表伪光球的黑体（ \(T_{{eff}}=7300\) K；灰色）、自由-自由辐射（ \(T=20,000\) K；紫色）、碳尘埃（ \(T=550\) K；深橙色）和硅酸盐尘埃（ \(T=350\) K；绿色）。

figures.caption_en: Figure 8: Schematic of the proposed LRD scenario inspired by Type IIn SNe and the GE . Figure modeled after scenarios in Smith ( 2013 , 2017 ); Smith et al. ( 2018 ) . Left: Prior to the LRD phase, the central engine drives a slowly outflowing envelope of gas that we refer to as the “cold wind” (crimson with outward arrows). An optically thick pseudo-photosphere (white dashed lines) obscures the hot surface of the star and gives it the appearance of a \(\approx 5000\) K surface. Such a “mini-eruption” phase is observed prior to the main explosion in Type IIn SNe/GE-like eruptions (e.g., Ofek et al. , 2014 ) . Right: The central engine drives hot winds (blue) that crash into the surrounding cold wind. Shocks are produced in the interface between hot and cold winds (orange), and the kinetic energy is converted highly efficiently into radiation by this wind interaction mechanism. The cold wind on top of the shock front is (partially) ionized by the forward shock. The pseudo-photosphere recedes into the interface between the winds, and then into the hot wind over time (e.g., Smith, 2017 ) . Emission lines, the photospheric continuum, nebular emission, Balmer absorption arise from the partially ionized layers in the cold wind – the cold wind is effectively what has been modeled in e.g., CLOUDY models for LRDs (e.g., Naidu et al. , 2025a ; Torralba et al. , 2025 ; Yan et al. , 2025 ) and other models that share a similar ionization structure (e.g., Sneppen et al. , 2026a ) .
figures.caption_zh: 图8: 受IIn型超新星和GE启发的LRD情景示意图。图模仿了Smith ( 2013 , 2017 ); Smith et al. ( 2018 ) 中的情景。左：在LRD阶段之前，中心引擎驱动一个缓慢外流的星风包层，我们称之为“冷星风”（深红色，带向外箭头）。一个光学厚的伪光球（白色虚线）遮蔽了恒星的热表面，使其呈现约5000 K的表面温度。这种“小喷发”阶段在IIn型超新星/类似GE的喷发之前被观测到（例如，Ofek et al. , 2014 ）。右：中心引擎驱动热星风（蓝色）撞击周围的冷星风。在冷热星风的界面处产生激波（橙色），动能通过这种星风相互作用机制高效转化为辐射。激波前沿上方的冷星风被前向激波（部分）电离。伪光球退缩到星风之间的界面，并随时间推移进入热星风（例如，Smith, 2017 ）。发射线、光球连续谱、星云发射、巴尔默吸收来自冷星风中的部分电离层——冷星风实际上就是例如针对LRDs的CLOUDY模型（例如，Naidu et al. , 2025a ; Torralba et al. , 2025 ; Yan et al. , 2025 ）以及其他具有相似电离结构的模型（例如，Sneppen et al. , 2026a ）中所建模的对象。

title: Insights into Jet-Induced Cloud Disruption in NGC 1316: ALMA Reveals a Spatially Extended Molecular Gas
comment: 47 pages, 20 figures, accepted for publication in ApJ
summary: We present ALMA CO($J=1-0$) observations of a nearby radio galaxy NGC1316 at a 100-pc resolution to investigate the impact of AGN jets on the molecular gas. The molecular gas exhibits complex spatial and kinematic distributions, with broad CO line widths ($>50$ km s$^{-1}$) observed in several regions. The interferometric CO flux is only 34%-38% compared to single-dish data, indicating a large fraction of spatially extended molecular gas, especially in the central regions. We identified 24 Giant Molecular Clouds Associations (GMAs) primarily within the ``NW Shell'' and the ``SE Blob''; these GMAs show velocity dispersions approximately twice as high as those in typical star-forming galaxies for their sizes. Analysis of archival ALMA CO($J=2-1$) and CO($J=3-2$) data reveals elevated line ratios ($R_{21} \sim 1$ and $R_{31} \sim 1$) in gas near the jet, whereas, away from the jet, typical values ($R_{21} \sim 0.7$, $R_{31} \sim 0.3$). A multi-wavelength comparison reveals a $\sim$5 kpc warm ionized gas shell that encompasses the molecular NW Shell. The observed energetics and bubble morphology are consistent with an expanding bubble model driven by the jet assuming a jet power of $1.6\times10^{43}$~erg~s$^{-1}$. We propose that the high extended gas fraction results from the destruction of molecular clouds due to interactions with the jet plasma. NGC1316 may be a good example of jet-induced negative feedback through the ablation, dispersal, and rarification of dense molecular clouds through jet-ISM interactions.

AI.tldr: 利用100pc分辨率ALMA CO观测，发现射电星系NGC1316中分子气体受AGN喷流影响显著：仅34%-38% CO通量来自致密结构，24个巨分子云关联体速度弥散是正常星系的两倍，喷流附近气体CO谱线比升高，存在约5kpc的电离气体壳层。结果表明喷流通过破坏、消散分子云实现负反馈。
AI.motivation: 研究AGN喷流对分子气体的影响，探究喷流-星际介质相互作用如何影响星系演化。
AI.method: 使用ALMA进行CO(J=1-0) 100pc分辨率观测，结合存档CO(2-1)和CO(3-2)数据，分析分子气体空间分布、运动学、谱线比，并与多波段数据对比。
AI.result: 发现CO干涉通量仅为单碟数据的34%-38%，存在大量延展分子气体；24个GMAs速度弥散是正常星暴星系的两倍；喷流附近R21~1、R31~1，远离喷流处R21~0.7、R31~0.3；存在~5kpc电离气体壳层包围分子NW壳层。
AI.conclusion: NGC1316是喷流通过破坏、消散和稀化分子云实现负反馈的典型案例；高延展气体分数源于喷流等离子体与分子云相互作用导致的云团瓦解。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们展示了利用ALMA对邻近射电星系NGC 1316进行的CO(J=1-0)观测，分辨率达100秒差距，以研究活动星系核喷流对分子气体的影响。分子气体展现出复杂的空间和运动学分布，在多个区域观测到宽的CO谱线宽度（>50 km s^{-1}）。干涉测量的CO流量仅为单天线数据的34%-38%，表明存在大量空间延展的分子气体，尤其是在中心区域。我们识别出24个巨分子云复合体（GMAs），主要位于“NW壳层”和“SE团块”中；这些GMAs的速度弥散度约为典型恒星形成星系中同等大小云团的两倍。对存档ALMA CO(J=2-1)和CO(J=3-2)数据的分析显示，靠近喷流的气体具有较高的谱线比值（R_{21} ~ 1 和 R_{31} ~ 1），而远离喷流处则为典型值（R_{21} ~ 0.7, R_{31} ~ 0.3）。多波段比较揭示了一个约5千秒差距的暖电离气体壳层，包裹着分子NW壳层。观测到的能量学和气泡形态与假设喷流功率为1.6×10^{43} erg s^{-1}的膨胀气泡模型一致。我们提出，高延展气体分数源于分子云与喷流等离子体相互作用导致的云团瓦解。NGC 1316可能是喷流通过烧蚀、消散和稀化稠密分子云实现负反馈的一个良好实例。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，NGC 1316是喷流通过破坏、消散和稀化分子云实现负反馈的典型案例；高延展气体分数源于喷流等离子体与分子云相互作用导致的云团瓦解。
